headline: UAE Exits OPEC+: Oil Barely Flinched And These 5 Energy Stocks Ripped
summary: The UAE just walked out of OPEC+ — and oil barely flinched, holding above $100. These 5 Permian-focused energy stocks led the tape Tuesday.
